name: Terminator Genisys: The YouTube Chronicles
overview: A new Terminator is sent from the future to the present day to hunt down and destroy a new threat – YouTube stars who will become important figures in the future human resistance. The YouTubers must band together to defeats a killer machine that looks like one of their own, and they’ll need the help of a powerful friend.

trailers.title: Terminator Genisys: The YouTube Chronicles Behind the Scenes
